Dhalai.Reply from Bank: Bank yet to give response to SLBC desk after Bank’s Earlier reply was not accepted by the house.
Dhalai.Suggestion made by house: IDFC Bank is requested to proceed for opening of branch at the allotted location.

South Tripura.Reply from Bank: Earlier Bank of Maharashtra stated that the Bank is in process of opening branch at Nalua which is around 4 KM away from allotted location however branch is yet to be opened
South Tripura.Suggestion made by house: Bank of Maharashtra has been requested to update the status to SLBC desk by email.

Khowai.Reply from Bank: Allocated to concerned Bank by SLBC on 17.05.2023. Bank’s reply to DFS: Assigned team is doing a detailed feasibility study of the location.
Khowai.Suggestion made by house: SLBC desk has been advised to take update from Fedral Bank through email.

Unakoti.Present Status: PO/Work order have placed for deployment ATM

North Tripura.Present Status: ATM has been installed by the Bank

West Tripura.Present Status: ATM has been installed by the Bank

Gomati.Present Status: Bank is in the process of setting up ATM at given location

Dhalai.Reply from Bank: Bank yet to give response to SLBC desk after Bank’s Earlier reply was not accepted by the house.
Dhalai.Suggestion made by house: IDFC Bank is requested to proceed for opening of branch at the allotted location.

North Tripura.Reply from Bank: ICICI Bank has been allocated alternate location at “Dasmanipara” due to Infrastructure issues within 05 km of radius vide our email letter dated 31.08.2024

Khowai.Reply from Bank: Allocated to concerned Bank by SLBC on 17.05.2023. Bank’s reply to DFS: Assigned team is doing a detailed feasibility study of the location.
Khowai.Suggestion made by house: Federal Bank to expedite the process.
